case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. PATRICK LEE

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-24-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, PATRICK AN INDIIVIDUAL $4,648.80 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $994.71 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,443.51, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK SERVED JUN-18-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, PATRICK AN INDIIVIDUAL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, PATRICK AN INDIIVIDUAL

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, PATRICK AN INDIIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-03-2008
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-24-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
